items.title: TM 1
items.description: Perfect for birthdays, engagements, weddings, graduations, garden parties, pre-dinner drinks, bespoke events -  you name the celebration, we can do it!
inclusions: 75 drinks with options to add more, if required
5 uniquely blended frozen margaritas including the crowd-pleasing classics and innovative TM pairings
Includes insurances and Occasional license. Application times can vary from council to council.

items.title: TM 2
items.description: Suitable for larger celebrations or a thirsty flock
inclusions: 8 unique frozen margaritas including the crowd-pleasing classics and innovative TM blends

items.title: Corporate Events & Pop‑ups
items.description: The ultimate crowd-pleaser. Fast-paced service for high footfall environments without compromising on quality.
inclusions: Unique and holistic frozen margaritas using feel good ingredients such as Kombucha & Kefir water.
